EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGlobeCompression

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Provides access to compress and uncompress JPEG data used by ArcGlobe.

[Guid("650FC137-7869-4414-A511-F7E176D3301E")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGlobeCompression

Methods

EndGlobeCompression()

End the compression of Globe JPEG data.

void EndGlobeCompression()

Examples

Sample Snippet

GlobeFromJPEG(int, ref byte, bool, out int, out byte)

UnCompress the Globe JPEG format to rgba data.

void GlobeFromJPEG(int inputSize, ref byte pSrcData, bool use5551, out int pOutputSize, out byte pDestData)

Parameters

inputSize int
pSrcData byte
use5551 bool
pOutputSize int
pDestData byte

Examples

Sample Snippet

GlobeToJPEG(int, ref byte, int, out int, out byte)

Compress rgba data to Globe JPEG format.

void GlobeToJPEG(int inputSize, ref byte pSrcData, int quality, out int pOutputSize, out byte pDestData)

Parameters

inputSize int
pSrcData byte
quality int
pOutputSize int
pDestData byte

Examples

Sample Snippet

InitGlobeCompression()

Initialize for the compression of Globe JPEG data.

void InitGlobeCompression()
